title: Exceeding Speed Limit
description: Driving faster than the posted speed limit in a residential zone.

title: Red Light Violation
description: Failure to stop at a red signal at a major intersection.

title: Driving Without License
description: Operating a motor vehicle without a valid driver's license.

title: Illegal U-Turn
description: Making a U-turn where prohibited by signage or road markings.

title: DUI (Alcohol/Drugs)
description: Driving under the influence of intoxicating substances.

title: Failure to Wear Seatbelt
description: Driver or passenger not using available seatbelts while moving.

title: Helmet Violation
description: Operating a motorcycle or bicycle without a protective helmet.

title: Child Seat Negligence
description: Failure to use an approved child safety seat for infants.

title: Expired Vehicle Registration
description: Operating a vehicle with registration that has expired.

title: Lack of Insurance
description: Operating a vehicle without valid third-party insurance.

title: Excessive Smoke Emission
description: Operating a vehicle that emits visible black smoke beyond limits.

title: Illegal Waste Disposal
description: Dumping hazardous waste or debris on public highways.

title: Blocking Fire Hydrant
description: Parking within 3 meters of a public fire hydrant.

title: Double Parking
description: Parking a vehicle on the roadway side of another parked vehicle.

title: Handicap Zone Violation
description: Parking in a space reserved for persons with disabilities.

title: Unauthorized Route (Commercial)
description: Commercial vehicles operating on restricted residential roads.

title: Overloading Passengers
description: Carrying more passengers than the vehicle's safe capacity.

title: Jaywalking
description: Crossing a high-speed roadway outside of designated crosswalks.

title: Obstructing Sidewalk
description: Placing objects or stalls that block pedestrian movement.

title: Violation of Pedestrian Right-of-Way
description: Failure to yield to pedestrians in a marked crosswalk.
